name: Boxweave
description: Crossing bands woven over and under, re-tinting at each crossing on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 32%; top: 0; width: 36%; height: 100%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 32%; width: 100%; height: 36%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } @match((@x + @y) % 2 == 0) { :before { z-index: 2; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
